steps.title: Spot the goal-to-action sequence
steps.content: The passage moves directly from her GOAL (demonstrate revision's value, encourage audiences) to her ACTION (being transparent with annotations). The transition must show how the action accomplishes or results from the intention.

steps.title: Apply the causal relationship
steps.content:
Thus is correct — it shows her transparent approach is a RESULT of her intention to demonstrate revision's value, directly accomplishing her stated goal. Nevertheless and Instead introduce unsupported contradictions, while Later merely indicates time without establishing the causal connection.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
